title: Beyond hope and hype: five certainties in the AI storm
description: The just-published Anthropic paper by Massenkoff and McCrory is a genuinely careful, well-intentioned and much-needed piece of work. The authors build a thoughtful exposure measure, draw on real usage data, apply a clean difference-in-differences framework and find limited employment effects to date. Every step is methodologically defensible. The conclusion they reach is probably entirely accurate [...]The post Beyond hope and hype: five certainties in the AI storm appeared first on Asia Times.

title: Baker Hughes’ US$10b Debt Raise Targets Energy Transition And AI Power
description: Baker Hughes (NasdaqGS:BKR) has launched multi currency debt offerings totaling about US$10b. The company plans to use the proceeds to help fund its proposed acquisition of Chart Industries. Baker Hughes has also secured new equipment supply wins in advanced nuclear reactor projects. The company is supplying technology for AI focused data centers that require high intensity power solutions. Baker Hughes, traditionally known for its oilfield services and energy technology, is now tying a...

title: Lam Research S&P 100 Entry Highlights Role In AI Chip Supply Chain
description: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) is set to join the S&P 100 index, reflecting its rising profile among the largest U.S. companies. The index change recognizes Lam's role in supplying equipment used to manufacture semiconductors that support AI and advanced computing. The inclusion is expected to align Lam Research more closely with other large cap technology and semiconductor names followed by institutional investors. Lam Research focuses on wafer fabrication equipment and services that...

title: Samsung’s MWC 2026 AI Push And What It Means For Investors
description: Samsung Electronics (KOSE:A005930) introduced its Galaxy S26 smartphones, Galaxy Buds4 lineup, and Galaxy Book6 laptops at Mobile World Congress 2026. The new devices focus on AI agents built into phones and PCs, tighter cross device integration, and updated privacy oriented display features. Samsung also highlighted AI driven manufacturing, satellite connectivity efforts, and expanded digital health capabilities across its hardware ecosystem.
